overall.description: Gameplay footage from God of War Ragnarök showing Kratos at a snowy mountain camp under the aurora borealis, followed by a transition to a volcanic realm called The Crucible with flowing lava and ancient Nordic ruins. The camera follows the character in third-person perspective as he explores both environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain camp with aurora borealis

agents.ego_description: walking around the campfire observing the colorful aurora borealis in the sky

notable_agents.action: Atreus sitting by the campfire tending to the flames

entered.detail: snow-covered peaks under a partly cloudy sky
vibrant pink and green northern lights shimmering in the sky
tall weathered stone structure with Nordic architecture
magical fire burning with purple, blue and orange flames
mythical treasure chest emitting bright green light

segments.scene_description: Kratos stands in a wide-open snowy mountain camp under a partly cloudy sky illuminated by the aurora borealis. He walks around a magical multicolored campfire where Atreus sits nearby. Ancient stone towers and a glowing green chest are visible among the snow-covered peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic crucible with flowing lava and ancient ruins

events.description: screen fades to black and transitions from snowy landscape to dark volcanic realm with flowing lava
text 'The Crucible' appears on screen indicating the location name

agents.ego_description: navigating carefully through the dangerous volcanic terrain avoiding lava flows and examining ruins

entered.detail: river of glowing orange molten lava flowing between black rock banks
jagged dark stone walls with glowing orange cracks and fissures
ancient stone architecture with archways and carved pillars
large golden sword embedded in the ground emitting a faint blue glow
cascading flow of molten lava pouring down into a pool

segments.scene_description: Following a fade transition, the scene shifts to The Crucible, a narrow volcanic canyon illuminated by flowing lava. Kratos walks along a rocky path beside molten rivers, passing Nordic stone ruins and a glowing golden sword embedded in the ground. The environment is enclosed by volcanic rock cliffs with a dark smoky sky overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a serene, frozen mountain sanctuary into the oppressive heat of a volcanic canyon. It begins with Kratos navigating a wide-open snowy camp beneath a cloudy sky illuminated by the aurora borealis, passing a multicolored campfire and ancient stone towers. As the environment fades and shifts, the cool blues of the tundra are replaced by the fiery glow of The Crucible, where the camera follows Kratos along a narrow rocky path. The scene then expands to reveal molten rivers of lava flowing beside Nordic stone ruins and a golden sword embedded in the earth. Finally, the open mountain vistas give way to an enclosed landscape of towering volcanic cliffs under a dark, smoky sky.
